landing.heroDesc: Complex university subjects and coding errors aren't meant to be conquered alone. Learn from fellow students or share your experience and become a true leader.
landing.footerDesc: A platform for knowledge exchange among students, finding mentors, and learning modern skills together.
landing.mockupDesc: Everything in one place: classes, coding, and video calls.

topMentors.title: Meet Our Top Mentors
topMentors.desc: Expert peers who lead in their fields and help many students.

features.title: Tengdosh Features
features.subtitle: Our platform provides all the necessary tools to facilitate the educational process and effective learning.

mentors.title: Mentors
mentors.desc: Work and exchange experience with expert active students.

problems.title: Problems
problems.desc: Solve specially designed logical and programming challenges.

tests.title: Tests
tests.desc: Short, engaging, and interactive tests to reinforce your knowledge.

growth.title: Growth
growth.desc: Boost your rating and build a solid foundation for your career.

howItWorks.title: How does Tengdosh ustoz work?
howItWorks.intro: This platform differs from traditional education. Here, everyone can be both a student and a teacher. A classmate who mastered a topic just yesterday will explain it to you in the simplest, "student-to-student" language.
howItWorks.step1: Search for the subject or technology you need.
howItWorks.step2: Choose a peer (mentor) with experience in that field.
howItWorks.step3: Set a convenient time and join a live lesson within the platform.
howItWorks.step4: Improve your knowledge and rate the mentor.

leaderboard.title: Mentors with the most subscribers
leaderboard.desc: The most popular mentors on the platform — top 3 mentors with the highest number of subscribers. Subscribe to them and level up your knowledge!

testimonials.title: What students say?
reviews: I struggled to understand logic problems, but a peer explained it perfectly in 10 minutes!
I found the solution to a topic I didn't understand at university here. Thanks!
I tried being a mentor. Teaching others helped improve my own knowledge too.
Had a question during late-night study, and found the answer immediately on the platform.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Tengdosh ustoz is not just a platform,
aboutPage.heroDesc: We believe every university student can fully realize their potential. One grows by teaching, another through learning.
aboutPage.problemDesc: Students admitted to university have different levels of knowledge. Some start programming from scratch, while others already arrive at Junior or Middle level. Since there's a uniform approach to everyone in classes, some fall behind while the strong ones get bored.
aboutPage.solutionDesc: "Tengdosh ustoz" (Peer-to-Peer learning) project! We connect talented students (mentors) with students in need of help. A peer's explanation in simple "student" language is much more effective and interesting than a professor's complex terminology.

list: Opportunity to study at a convenient time, individually or in groups.
Reinforcing their own knowledge by teaching others.
Rising in university rankings and earning extra income.
Building a strong and friendly internal IT community.
Lightening the workload of faculty and staff.

web.title: Main Web Platform
web.desc: The hub for managing all processes, searching for teachers, and tracking rankings.

video.title: Internal Video Communication
video.desc: No need for third-party software like Zoom. Lessons take place right on the platform itself.

bot.title: Telegram Bot Integration
bot.desc: Lesson schedules, reminders, and instant messages come directly to your Telegram.

aboutPage.ctaDesc: Learn if you want, teach others if you want. Most importantly — don't stay still!
